title: Digest — Mar 21, 2026, 12:01 AM UTC
summary:
# Devlog Digest for Pwarf

Exciting updates have been merged into the main branch since our last digest! Here's a summary of the key features and fixes:

## New Features

- **Guest Mode**: Players can now enjoy the game without needing an account!
  - A new **Play as Guest** button has been added to the authentication screen.
  - An anonymous user ID is generated for guests, allowing seamless integration with existing database and simulation code.
  - A reminder is displayed to inform guests that their progress won't be saved.

## Fixes

- **Anonymous Authentication Improvements**: 
  - The player existence check has been improved by using `.maybeSingle()` instead of `.single()`, preventing login issues when no row is found.
  - Anonymous users will now have their usernames formatted as `anon-<first 8 chars of user ID>`, ensuring a better experience during first logins.

Thank you for your continued support as we develop Pwarf!

## Merged PRs
- #493
- #491

## Sim Health Check

Baseline scenario: 3 dwarves, 500 ticks (10 days)

- **Dwarves alive:** 3 / 3
- **Tasks completed:** 176
- **Avg stress:** 67.4
- **Deaths:**
  - No deaths
